title: Daniel Vala
text:
Welcome to my ePortfolio. I am a Business Studies student at Dublin City University with a keen interest in finance and data analytics.
This portfolio showcases my academic journey, technical skills, and professional development throughout the BAA1028 Workflow & Data Management module.
Feel free to explore my projects or learn more about me.
